case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CURTIS JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT -ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET, #805A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED APR-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.20 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, CURTIS
